steps.name: the user navigates to the SAP URL
the user enters a valid username and password
When the user click on the Finance Tab
And the user selects Manage Payment Blocks from the dashboard
And the user enters Supplier ID "17100088"
And the user enters Company Code "1710"

steps.name: And the user selects Status "Account Blocked" from the drop-down
And the user clicks on the Go button to fetch results
And the user clicks on the "17100088" record hyperlink
And the user clicks on the Unblock Supplier button on the supplier detail page
Then the supplier should be unblocked and a confirmation Toast message should be displayed

description:
As an Accounts Payable user
  I want to unblock a supplier in SAP
  So that the supplier can receive payments again
fullName: features/TC004_Validate_Supplier_Account_Unblock_in_Accounts_Payable.feature#Unblock a supplier currently blocked for payment
